source_name: Council of the EU / EEAS via EU Neighbours East
text: This news item summarises a declaration by the EU High Representative condemning Russian cyber operations against Ukraine, with specific reference to the attack on the KA-SAT satellite network operated by Viasat. It states that the cyber activity caused significant disruptions for public authorities, businesses and users in Ukraine and several EU member states and presents the incident as part of wider hostile behaviour in cyberspace linked to the invasion. The text calls on Russia to stop the war and emphasises EU political support for Ukraine in response to these operations.
attribution_coding_note: EU High Representative declaration 'condemning Russian cyber operations' with specific reference to the KA-SAT attack.
